topic.description: Source MQTT topic or logical event source, for example ems/safety.

type.description: Logical event type: safety, wallbox, boiler, battery_grid, plan, appliance, family_advice.

key.description: Stable deduplication key for anti-spam logic.

human_hint.description: Authoritative Czech explanation of what happened. The model should rewrite it, not reinterpret it.

recommendation_hint.description: Authoritative Czech recommendation. If omitted or empty, the model must not invent advice.

family_hint.description: Optional household-facing hint, for example which appliances are OK to run now. Intended for family dashboard/advisor mode.

question_hint.description: Optional question or offer to the user. It must be non-binding and require confirmation before any action.

action_offers.description: Optional safe offers the assistant may mention. These are not executed automatically.

forbidden_topics.description: Topics the output must not mention.

silent.description: When true, the commentator must return BEZ_KOMENTARE.

notify.description: Whether this event should be considered for mobile notification.

speak.description: Whether this event may be spoken by a future voice layer.
